game_start_scene.title: Living room
game_start_scene.text:
A normal day around 2pm, you are watching TV and scrolling on your phone whilst the snow falls gently outside.
 Your peace is broken by a shy knock on your front door.

main_game_hallway_1.title: Hallway
main_game_hallway_1.text: A tall and slender but cute man stands at your front door behind him, down the path, a car with a dented fender. 'Sorry miss' - foreign, British maybe, 'my car.. I'm not used to such conditions..' he trails off, his clothes are sodden from where he attempted to repair his car. 'I've called someone out, but given the weather it could be a while, is there any chance to loiter around your place?' Oh yes, he is going to make your perfect subsmissive slave this weekend

options.text: Invite him in to your kitchen
Leave him out there whilst you change into something... fresher

main_game_hallway_1_hard_option_kitchen_.title: Hallway - Kitchen
main_game_hallway_1_hard_option_kitchen_.text: On the way to the kitchen you see your sleeping pills on the side table, pick them up?

hard_option_kitchen_1.title: Kitchen
hard_option_kitchen_1.text: In the kitchen you offer him a seat and begin to make some tea, once made you -

options.text: Try to add the pills discreetly to his drink

hard_option_kitchen_2.title: Kitchen
hard_option_kitchen_2.text: You succeed! The pill is slowly dissolving in the hot liquid and you hand it to him none the wiser Enjoy sweetie, you look so cold. He takes it and starts drinking whilst you make light talk.

hard_option_kitchen_1_reversed.title: Kitchen
hard_option_kitchen_1_reversed.text: The pills make a loud noise and you decide not to bother, there will be other chances... you hand it to him regardless Enjoy sweetie, you look so cold. He takes it and starts drinking whilst you make light talk.

hard_option_kitchen_2_reversed.title: Kitchen
hard_option_kitchen_2_reversed.text: He eyes the pills you set down on the counter whilst drinking and you see him start pretending to sip his drink. Your heart beats fast, 'what if he's on to me' you think, you need to distract him.

options.text: Sit close and stroke his leg
